creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
It is my opinion that if a package brings its own 'private' and possibly/obviously 'competing' library it should link to it in an entirely predictable and POLA manner.

If that means using the solution from comment #4, i.e. rolling out a library remap for mysqld, so be it (unless it violates the Porter's Handbook or other POLA principles).
